case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CHARLES EDWARD JAMES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $726.39 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, CHARLES EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES EDWARD JAMES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES, CHARLES EDWARD $726.39 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $806.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, CHARLES EDWARD
